vocab.meaning: kết hợp các vận động phụ (vận động phát sinh trong sinh hoạt hàng ngày)
vocab.example: I try to incorporate incidental exercise into my routine by walking to the grocery store instead of driving.

vocab.meaning: một đại lộ/đường chính nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: I must confess that I dislike walking along a bustling thoroughfare due to the exhaust fumes and noise.

vocab.meaning: duy trì một nhịp độ ổn định
vocab.example: When I go for my evening stroll, I find that maintaining a steady rhythm helps me relax after a stressful day.

vocab.meaning: khu vực dành riêng cho người đi bộ
vocab.example: The city center has several lovely pedestrian precincts that make walking both safe and enjoyable.

vocab.meaning: cải thiện sức khỏe tim mạch
vocab.example: Walking is an underrated way to improve cardiovascular fitness without putting too much strain on the joints.
I'm a big fan of urban exploration, so I often spend my weekends walking through unfamiliar neighborhoods.
I don't walk much in the countryside because I'm not particularly fond of navigating rugged terrain.

vocab.meaning: việc đi lại chủ yếu bằng cách đi bộ
vocab.example: My daily commute is quite foot-heavy, as the subway station is about a twenty-minute walk from my apartment.

vocab.meaning: tạo điều kiện cho/mở đường cho (nghĩa bóng: tạo tâm trạng tốt)
vocab.example: A morning walk often paves the way for a highly productive afternoon at the office.
I prefer walking at a leisurely pace so I can fully appreciate the architecture of the city.
